# routerFW project development map

Based on CHANGELOG.md (release tags). CHANGELOG export date: 2026-02-20.

![Growth and evolution — eras and version branching](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iqubik/routerFW/output/architecture-growth-dark.svg)

*Visualization: four eras (I–IV), each with release cells showing key features and dates. Generated by `system/architecture-tetris.ps1`.*

---

## 1. Timeline (by major versions)

| Era   | Versions     | Period         | Stage summary |
|-------|---------------|----------------|----------------|
| **I** | 1.0           | 2025-12-25     | First full-featured builder (Image Builder) |
| **II**| 2.0 – 2.51    | 2025-12-27 – 29 | Source Builder, universal profiles, hooks, Vermagic, unpacker |
| **III**| 3.2 – 3.9   | 2026-01-02 – 09 | Unified _Builder, wizards, IPK pipeline, RU/EN, system/ isolation |
| **IV**| 4.0 – 4.43    | 2026-01-11 – 02-18 | Linux (Bash), localization, patches, local IB, variable migration, unified dictionaries |

---

## 2. Development phases (eras)

### Era I — Foundation (1.0)
- Image Builder for fast customization of ready-made OpenWrt images.
- Single build mode, single platform script.

### Era II — Universal combo (2.0 – 2.51)
- **2.0:** Source Builder (Legacy 18.04 / Modern 22.04), Persistence Cache, universal `.conf` (IB + Source), GitHub mirrors, separate output folders.
- **2.1:** `SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG`, fork support (ImmortalWrt), resources moved to `_unpacker.bat`.
- **2.4:** Fine-tuning via `SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG`, RAX3000M ImmortalWrt profile, modular unpacker, Packer v1.5.
- **2.5:** Smart Hooks (`hooks.sh`), Vermagic Hack, smart cache cleanup.
- **2.51:** UTF-8 in packer/unpacker, fix for hooks in IB, docker-compose refactor.

### Era III — Platform and usability (3.2 – 3.9)
- **3.2:** Unified `_Builder.bat` (IMAGE/SOURCE in one menu), parallel build `[A]`, no nested CMD brackets; profile wizard; Clean Menu `[C]`; atomic SDK download, wget/opkg retry; CCache, Self-Healing in Source; hooks.sh Vermagic v1.3.1, ImmortalWrt.
- **3.3:** Menuconfig `[K]`, manual config `manual_config`, Smart Init; artifact collection on subtarget change; CRLF/permissions in Docker.
- **3.4:** mt79/RAX3000M eMMC builds (Chinese Wi‑Fi), core control `SRC_CORES`, Profile Wizard fix (BOM).
- **3.5:** Data protection — `personal.flag`, exclude profiles/scripts/firmware_output from reset; auto-import DEFAULT_PACKAGES in wizard.
- **3.51:** Profile Wizard v2 — ImmortalWrt, mirrors (KyaruCloud), Z/Q navigation, State Machine.
- **3.54:** Wizard v2.2 — smart input, auto-naming, overwrite protection.
- **3.6:** Refactor — all system code in `system/`; docs/ (index, 01–04); README rewrite.
- **3.8:** IPK pipeline — binary package wrapper, per-profile sandbox, architecture check, Binary Integrity (Windows), profile folder monitoring.
- **3.9:** RU/EN (weighted language detection), localization of _Builder.bat and wizards; WIFI EN patch; Linux Alpha.

### Era IV — Cross-platform and maturity (4.0 – 4.43)
- **4.0:** Bash port — `_Builder.sh`, `_packer.sh`, `_unpacker.sh`; roadmap 1–6 (including bilingual).
- **4.02:** bat/sh sync; move Menuconfig settings to `.conf`; M (Manual Config) indicator; Unpacker in EN; timestamp for config backups.
- **4.04_hotfix:** H/M indicators, search for any artifacts; fix for “endless” download wait; auto SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG in wizard; UTF-8 no BOM; NanoPi R3S.
- **4.09:** Orchestrators `ib_builder.sh` / `src_builder.sh`; profile templates; docs/audit.md, LICENSE.en; wget/git retries; credsStore fix, CRLF; success by artifacts.
- **4.1:** Self-healing, improved config parsing; hooks.sh (smart cleanup, auto Wi‑Fi); WSL stability.
- **4.11:** HOTFIX GCC (seccomp) on Ubuntu 24.04/WSL2; Legacy 18.04 → old-releases; git dubious ownership; SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG format in wizard.
- **4.12:** Menuconfig save rework (bat/sh); full SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG in profiles; seccomp removal; Legacy Dockerfile to official repos; packer profile updates.
- **4.20:** Docker volume lock fix (stop containers before remove); bat/sh parity; chown artifacts, absolute paths in WSL; colored output, time in [A], summary before [E]; menuconfig with device name hyphens; import_ipk libopenssl1.1→libopenssl; Ctrl+C.
- **4.22:** RAX3000M eMMC — single target cmcc_rax3000m-emmc-mtk; CONFIG_VERSIONOPT, metadata; disk/modem packages; Vermagic Hack 2.0, hash mirrors; “Stay in Container”.
- **4.3:** Patch system `custom_patches/<profile>` (mirror overlay), X indicator; docs 05-patch-sys (RU/EN).
- **4.31:** (no release notes in CHANGELOG)
- **4.32:** custom_patches and HOST_PATCHES_DIR in .sh; Stay in Container; Clean Package Index; Smart Device Detection; Image Builder — .zst/.xz, URL/query fix; CUSTOM_REPOS; libxcrypt/GCC 13+ in hooks.sh; Git LFS; rax3000m_emmc update.
- **4.40:** Local Image Builder in profile (archive path); auto-update profile after Source build (offer to set IB); quick re-menuconfig; correct repo URLs in create_profile (ARCH); list of built files after build; unpack, repo and patch fixes.
- **4.41:** Rename PKGS→IMAGE_PKGS, EXTRA_IMAGE_NAME→IMAGE_EXTRA_NAME; auto-migrate profiles in _Builder.bat; backward compatibility in ib_builder.sh; template and docs.
- **4.42:** migrate_profile_vars() in _Builder.sh; case-insensitive menu input; Enter=Yes on exit; Docker Credentials Fix (copy config without credsStore); full _Builder.sh localization (L_*), 40+ keys; create_profile.sh IMAGE_*, fantastic-packages/$ARCH; UTF-8 BOM in create_profile.ps1; .dockerignore (firmware_output etc.); .gitattributes; docker compose up in .sh; ImmortalWrt mirrors in hooks and wizards; tr -d '\r' for profile.
- **4.43:** Unified dictionaries ru.env/en.env with {C_*} placeholders; loaders in bat/sh; file-header.mdc convention; hooks.sh v1.7 — vermagic mirror chain, openwrt-24.10-6.6 branch kmods only; create_profile 4 IB sources for ImmortalWrt.

---

## 3. Key themes

| Theme | Versions | Summary |
|-------|----------|---------|
| **Two build modes** | 2.0 → | Image Builder + Source Builder, single .conf |
| **Cache and speed** | 2.0, 3.2, 4.09 | Persistence Cache, CCache, Self-Healing, wget/git retry |
| **Vermagic** | 2.5, 3.2, 4.22, 4.32, 4.43 | Kernel hash substitution, mirrors, 6.6 branch |
| **Hooks and patches** | 2.5, 3.2, 4.3, 4.32 | hooks.sh, custom_patches, dos2unix |
| **Profiles and wizards** | 2.0, 3.2, 3.5–3.54, 4.02–4.43 | create_profile, SRC_EXTRA_CONFIG, ImmortalWrt, IMAGE_* migration |
| **IPK and packages** | 3.8, 3.9, 4.20 | .ipk wrapping, per-profile sandbox, libopenssl |
| **Unified launcher** | 3.2, 4.0 | _Builder.bat → _Builder.sh, M/E/A/C/K menu |
| **Localization** | 3.9, 4.42, 4.43 | RU/EN, L_* dictionaries, ru.env/en.env, {C_*} |
| **Docker and OS** | 2.0–4.43 | volumes, locks, WSL, Ubuntu 18/22/24, seccomp, credsStore |
| **Repo structure** | 3.6, 4.09, 4.41, 4.42 | system/, docs/, .dockerignore, .gitattributes, variable migration |

---

## 5. Current state (as of 4.43)

- **Platforms:** Windows (.bat, PowerShell), Linux (.sh).
- **Modes:** Image Builder (fast build), Source Builder (full compile).
- **Languages:** Russian, English (dictionaries `system/lang/ru.env`, `en.env`).
- **Profiles:** Universal `.conf` (IMAGE_*, SRC_*, shared); PKGS/EXTRA_IMAGE_NAME migration on startup.
- **Customization:** custom_files, custom_packages, src_packages, custom_patches, hooks.sh.
- **Forks:** OpenWrt, ImmortalWrt (including mt798x 6.6 branch), multiple IB and vermagic mirrors.

The map may be updated as new tags and CHANGELOG entries appear.
